total_ordering
astuple)
attrib
attrsFT)
order
slots
frozenc
VersionInfoa
    A version object that can be compared to tuple of length 1--4:
    >>> attr.VersionInfo(19, 1, 0, "final")  <= (19, 2)
    True
    >>> attr.VersionInfo(19, 1, 0, "final") < (19, 1, 1)
    True
    >>> vi = attr.VersionInfo(19, 2, 0, "final")
    >>> vi < (19, 1, 1)
    False
    >>> vi < (19,)
    False
    >>> vi == (19, 2,)
    True
    >>> vi == (19, 2, 1)
    False
    .. versionadded:: 19.2
    )
typec
        Parse *s* and return a _VersionInfo.
        
finalr
year
minor
micro
releaselevel)
split
append
int)
6/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/attr/_version_info.py
_from_version_string&
z VersionInfo._from_version_stringc
        Ensure *other* is a tuple of a valid length.
        Returns a possibly transformed *other* and ourselves as a tuple of
        the same length as *other*.
        r
	__class__r
isinstance
tuple
NotImplementedErrorr
self
otherr
_ensure_tuple3
VersionInfo._ensure_tuplec
NotImplemented
themr
__eq__F
VersionInfo.__eq__c
__lt__N
VersionInfo.__lt__N)

__module__
__qualname__
__doc__r
strr

	functoolsr
